module.name: tool
module.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate (lib marix_tool) that defines the per-tool ToolProgram interface and compiles one executable per native tool program. tool_program.rs defines ToolProgram, the interface each native tool program implements (preview returns marix_common::ToolPreview, invoke runs the tool for a JSON call). native/ owns the concrete tool programs (file/ and shell/), each implementing ToolProgram and exposing a cfg-gated SelectedTool alias behind a Cargo feature so exactly one tool is active per build. tool_main.rs is the shared binary entry whose main runs the compile-selected SelectedTool through a private run<T: ToolProgram> that reads process arguments and speaks the --preview/--run JSON protocol over stdout. This crate no longer contains the Executor-side Tool handle; that handle now lives in the host crate (host/executor/tool.rs). lib.rs and the Cargo manifest are namespace/re-export wiring and package metadata only.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Concrete native tool programs grouped by category: filesystem tools under file/ and shell command execution under shell/.
